channel.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence Daily
channel.description: Daily financial intelligence snapshot — markets, crypto, macro, construction, housing, jobs, and portfolio

item.title: 📊 Open Financial Intelligence Dashboard
item.description:
📊 Financial Intelligence Dashboard
Interactive charts and analysis — markets, crypto, housing, jobs, construction costs, credit stress, and macro regime scoring. Updated daily by the Nightly Consolidator.
Open Dashboard →

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Tuesday, May 5, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily (weekdays) · as of 2026-05-05

Regime: Neutral · HY Spreads: Tight

S&P futures +0.55% · DXY 98.43 (Down) · 10Y 4.43% · VIX 18.29

Fear & Greed: 62 (Greed) · Put/Call 0.76

WTI $102.65 · Gold $4560.75

Sector — Leader: XLE · Laggard: XLK

⚠️ Alerts: IBRX

₿ BTC EOD $79,810 · Reclaimed bull market support band first time in 6 months; tested $80,393 intraday (highest since Jan 31); 200-day EMA ~$82,000 remains overhead

₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive Mondays · as of 2026-05-04

💡 BTC $79,810 · 24h +2.50% · Structure: Neutral · Dominance: —

🔥 BTC/IGV correlation: 0.73 · On-chain phase: Accumulation

Stablecoin market cap: $322B

🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-01

🏠 Local: April 2026 Hollister median list $795K, $411/sqft; San Benito County median sale $755K, -2.1% YoY

🏠 30Y mortgage: 6.30% · MBA Refi: 978 · NAHB HMI: 34

Existing sales 3.98M · New sales 587K · Starts 1502K · Permits 1372K

NAR median $408800 · Case-Shiller YoY +0.7% · Months supply 4.1

CA median $873900 · Local (Hollister) median $741000 · Months supply 4.1

💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims weekly when flagged · as of 2026-05-01

💼 NFP: 178K · U-3: 4.3% · LFPR: 61.9% · AHE YoY: +3.5%

JOLTS openings: 6.9M · ADP private: 62K

Initial claims (4-wk): 207.5K · Continuing: 1785K

Construction payrolls: 26K · CA unemployment: 5.4%

🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of 2026-05-01

🏗️ Cost environment: Inflating

MaterialPrice
Lumber (per MBF)$573
Copper (per lb)$5.98
Steel HRC (per ton)$1075

RMI: 62 · ABI: 49.8 · Backlog: 8.1mo · Permits: 1372K

📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of 2026-05-04

📊 Regime: Neutral · 2s10s: 0.59 · Credit: Tight

ISM PMI: 52.7 · Fed cuts priced: 0 · DXY trend: Down

Sector rotation: Leading: XLE, XLU / Lagging: XLK, XLV

Construction payrolls: —K

💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-01

💰 S&P EPS beat rate: 84% · Blended EPS growth: +15.1%

AMD hit all-time high at $354; S&P 500 broke 7200 for first time; Big Tech AI capex surges to $725B combined

⚠️ Key risk: AI capex sustainability — free cash flow turning negative at Amazon; concentration risk in Tech/Semis holdings as sector leads Q1 earnings

📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated 2026-05-05 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Monday, May 4, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of 2026-05-04

Risk posture: Risk-On. S&P futures +0.20%, DXY 98.0 (Down), 10Y yield 4.35%, VIX 16.89, HY spreads Tight.

Fear & Greed: 67 (Greed). Sector leader XLE · laggard XLK.

BTC: EOD $78,803 (+0.40% 24h), live $78,764, dominance 58.5%.

👉 Alerts: IBRX, PLTR, AMD, AVGO

💡 BTC level: $79,431 resistance tested but not broken; $77,625 support holding

✅ Greed reading at 67 with VIX sub-17 confirms risk-on tone — energy outperforming as DXY softens.

₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive Mondays · as of 2026-05-04

BTC price & structure: EOD $78,803 · 24h +0.40% · dominance 58.5%. F&G 67 (Greed).

Weekly deep-dive (week of 2026-05-04):

  • BTC/IGV 30-day correlation: 0.73 — re-tightened to a multi-year high; software-stock coupling reinstated.
  • On-chain phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at 7-year low (~2.21M BTC); MVRV Z-Score back to 1.2 (high-conviction zone); whales added record ~270K BTC over 30 days.
  • Stablecoin market cap: $322B — fresh ATH after $1B inflows; weekly volume ~$2.3T pace, on track for $50T+ in 2026.

⚠️ BTC/IGV correlation jumping back to 0.73 puts the store-of-value decoupling thesis on hold — BTC priced as part of the AI-software complex this week.

✅ Stablecoin float at $322B ATH reinforces structural payments-rail demand independent of BTC price action.

🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-04

Local Hollister/San Benito (new today): median $741,000 · DOM 83 days · 1.52 months supply.

Hollister median $741K, +5.1% YoY (Mar 2026 Redfin)

National & CA (May 1 monthly): 30Y mortgage 6.30% · CA median $873,900 · NAR median $408,800 · existing sales 3.98M · new sales 587K · NAHB HMI 34.

Case-Shiller YoY 0.7% · FHFA HPI YoY 1.7% · national months-of-supply 4.1.

⚠️ NAHB HMI at 34 signals weak builder confidence — supply pipeline pressure ahead.

💡 Hollister at 1.52 months supply remains tight — 5.1% YoY price gain holds despite rate environment.

💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims when flagged · as of 2026-05-01

Headline labor: NFP +178K · U-3 4.3% · LFPR 61.9% · AHE YoY 3.5%.

Detail: JOLTS openings 6.9M · quit rate 1.9% · ADP private +62K · initial claims 207.5K (4-wk) · continuing 1785K.

Construction & CA: construction payrolls 26K · CA unemployment 5.4%.

⚠️ ADP +62K is soft — watch the next NFP for confirmation of cooling labor demand.

🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of 2026-05-01
MaterialPrice
Lumber (per MBF)$573
Copper (per lb)$5.98
Steel HRC (per ton)$1075

RMI: 62 · National permits: 1372K · Backlog: 8.1 months · ABI: 49.8.

Cost environment: Inflating.

⚠️ ABI at 49.8 (sub-50) signals architectural billings still contracting — soft pipeline for non-residential into late 2026.

📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of 2026-05-04
IndicatorReading
Yield curve (2s10s)0.59
Credit spreadsTight
ISM PMI52.7
Fed cuts priced0
DXY trendDown
Regime scoreNeutral

Sector rotation: Leading: XLE, XLU / Lagging: XLK, XLV.

💡 ISM at 52.7 (above 50) with curve steepening to 0.59 confirms regime drift toward expansion — but zero Fed cuts priced caps the dovish read.

💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-01

Q1 earnings (May): S&P EPS beat rate 84% · blended EPS growth 15.1%.

Portfolio: AMD ATH at $354; S&P 500 broke 7200; Big Tech AI capex hit $725B combined.

⚠️ Key risk: AI capex sustainability — Amazon FCF turning negative; Tech/Semis concentration risk.

📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated 2026-05-04 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Sunday, May 3, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of 2026-05-03

Risk posture: Neutral. BTC closed at $$78,324 (0.02% 24h), Fear & Greed at 45 (Fear), dominance 60.66%. ✅ Regime stable through the weekend.

Weekday market gauges (DXY, 10Y, VIX, put/call, sector leaders, HY spreads) skip on weekends — last weekday close held into Sunday's open.

💡 BTC level alert: $79,422 R1 resistance tested again, not broken; held above $77K support

₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly Mon · as of 2026-04-27

BTC price & structure (2026-05-02): $$78,324 · 24h 0.02% · dominance 60.66%. F&G 45 (Fear).

Weekly deep-dive (week of 2026-04-27):

  • BTC/IGV 30-day correlation: 0.68 — softening vs 1.0 peak; decoupling thesis gaining ground.
  • On-chain phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at multi-year lows; LTH supply at historic highs.
  • Stablecoin market cap: $322B — new ATH; surpassing Visa+MC combined throughput.

💡 BTC dominance breakout above 60% confirms intra-crypto risk-off — alts on the back foot.

🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly · as of 2026-05-01

Local Hollister/San Benito: median $741000 · 187 active listings · 4.1 months supply.

National & CA: 30Y mortgage 6.3% · CA median $873900 · NAR median $408800 · existing sales 3.98M · new sales 587K · NAHB HMI 34.

Case-Shiller YoY 0.7% · FHFA HPI YoY 1.7% · national months-of-supply 4.1.

⚠️ NAHB HMI at 34 signals weak builder confidence — supply pipeline pressure ahead.

💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly · as of 2026-05-01

Headline labor: NFP +178K · U-3 4.3% · LFPR 61.9% · AHE YoY 3.5%.

Detail: JOLTS openings 6.9M · quit rate 1.9% · ADP private +62K · initial claims 207.5K (4-wk avg) · continuing 1785K.

Construction & CA: construction payrolls 26K · CA unemployment 5.4%.

⚠️ ADP +62K is soft — watch the May 8 NFP for confirmation of cooling labor demand.

🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of 2026-05-01
MaterialPrice
Lumber (per MBF)$573
Copper (per lb)$5.98
Steel HRC (per ton)$1075

Remodeling Market Index (RMI): 62 · National permits: 1372K · Backlog: 8.1 months · ABI: 49.8.

Cost environment: Inflating.

⚠️ ABI at 49.8 (below 50) signals architectural billings still contracting — soft pipeline for non-residential work into late 2026.

📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of 2026-04-27
IndicatorReading
Yield Curve (2s10s)0.55
Credit SpreadsTight
ISM PMI52.7
Fed Path (cuts priced)1
DXY TrendDown
Regime ScoreRisk-On

Sector rotation: Leading: XLE, XLF, XLV / Lagging: XLK, XLY, XLC

✅ Four of five macro inputs supportive — regime tilt favors continued risk-on absent geopolitical shock.

💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly · as of May 2026

S&P 500 EPS beat rate: 84.0% · Blended EPS growth: 15.1%.

Portfolio notes: AMD hit all-time high at $354; S&P 500 broke 7200 for first time; Big Tech AI capex surges to $725B combined

⚠️ Key risk: AI capex sustainability — free cash flow turning negative at Amazon; concentration risk in Tech/Semis holdings as sector leads Q1 earnings

📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot
Dashboard: Open Interactive Dashboard
Generated 2026-05-03 by Claude Cowork · Nightly Consolidator

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Saturday, May 02, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of 2026-05-02 (Weekend)
Regime: Neutral (weekend) · Markets closed
Last close (May 1): S&P futures +0.13% · DXY 98.60 ↓ · 10Y 4.36% · VIX 17.10 · Oil $105.07 · Gold $4,550
Fear & Greed: 43 (Fear) — shifted from Greed to Fear over weekend
👉 Watch: AAPL, GOOGL, PLTR, IBRX flagged on last trading day
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of 2026-05-02
BTC: $78,324 (+2.15% 24h) · Dominance: 60.6%
EOD (May 1): $78,178 · Structure: Neutral
⚠️ Key Level: Testing $79,423 resistance — range-bound between $75,637 and $79,423
💡 Weekly (Apr 27): BTC/IGV correlation 0.68 (easing) · On-chain: Accumulation phase · Stablecoin mcap: $322B ATH
Whale activity: Exchange reserves at 7-year low (~2.21M BTC); LTH controls ~78.3% of supply; whales added 270K BTC in 30 days
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-01
Local (Hollister/San Benito): Median $741K · Active listings: 187 · Months supply: 4.1
💡 Homes selling significantly faster — 28 days vs 55 days YoY; median up 5.1% YoY per Redfin March data
National: Existing sales 3.98M · New home sales 587K · Starts 1,502K · Permits 1,372K
Prices: NAR median $408,800 · Case-Shiller YoY +0.7% · FHFA +1.7%
Rates: 30Y mortgage 6.30% · MBA Refi Index 978 · NAHB HMI 34
⚠️ NAHB HMI at 34 — builder confidence remains very weak despite rate improvements
CA: Median $873,900 · National months supply: 4.1
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of 2026-05-01
NFP: +178K · U-3: 4.3% · LFPR: 61.9%
Wages: Avg hourly earnings YoY +3.5%
Openings: JOLTS 6.9M · Quit rate 1.9% · ADP private +62K
Claims: Initial (4-wk avg) 207.5K · Continuing 1,785K
Construction: Payrolls +26K · Next NFP release: May 8, 2026
California: Unemployment 5.4%
✅ Labor market healthy — NFP solid, claims low, construction adding jobs
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of 2026-05-01
Lumber$573/MBF
Copper$5.98/lb
Steel HRC$1,075/ton
RMI: 62 · ABI: 49.8 · Backlog: 8.1 months · Permits: 1,372K
⚠️ Cost Environment: Inflating — material costs rising across all categories
💡 ABI below 50 signals future architecture billings contraction; RMI at 62 remains above breakeven
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of 2026-04-27
Regime: Risk-On · 4/5 indicators Supportive
Yield Curve (2s10s)+0.55%✅ Supportive
Credit Spreads (HY)~284 bps✅ Supportive
ISM PMI52.7✅ Supportive
Fed Path~1 cut pricedNeutral
DXY98.5✅ Supportive
Sector Rotation: Leading: XLE, XLF, XLV / Lagging: XLK, XLY, XLC
⚠️ Watch: Iran peace talks stalled — oil spiked, dollar bounced; geopolitical re-escalation risk remains
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-01
S&P EPS Beat Rate: 84% · Blended EPS Growth: +15.1%
💡 Portfolio: AMD hit ATH at $354; S&P 500 broke 7200; Big Tech AI capex surges to $725B combined
⚠️ Key Risk: AI capex sustainability — FCF turning negative at Amazon; concentration risk in Tech/Semis as sector leads Q1 earnings

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Friday, May 01, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of 2026-05-01
✅ Regime: Risk-On — S&P futures +0.13%, strong momentum continuing
💡 DXY 98.60 (trend: Down) · 10Y yield 4.36% · 2s10s spread +0.50% (positive slope)
👉 VIX 17.10 — low volatility, risk appetite intact
📊 Fear/Greed: 70 (Greed) · Put/Call: 0.46 (bullish skew)
🔥 WTI Oil $105.07 · Gold $4,550 · HY Spreads: Tight
⚠️ Alert tickers: AAPL, GOOGL, PLTR, IBRX
📌 Sector rotation: XLE leading, XLK lagging — energy over tech continues
💡 Macro voices: Visser sees AI growth driving forward-looking markets; Pomp highlights BTC as non-sovereign geopolitical hedge amid de-dollarization
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of 2026-05-01
📊 BTC EOD: $76,316 · 24h: +0.24% · Dominance: 58.3%
⚠️ Testing $75,731 support — held so far but under pressure
📊 Structure: Neutral
💡 Weekly (Apr 27): BTC/IGV correlation 0.68 — decoupling from tech continues
✅ On-chain phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at 7-year low, LTH at 78.3% of supply
🔥 Stablecoin market cap: $322B ATH — institutional demand floor confirmed
👉 Whale wallets grew to 2,140 (from 2,082 in Dec) — largest monthly buy since 2013
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of 2026-05-01
📌 Local Hollister/San Benito: Median $741K · Active listings 100 · DOM 28 days
💡 Homes selling significantly faster than last year (28 vs 55 days YoY); median up 5.1% YoY per Redfin March data

👉 NAR median price $408,800 · Case-Shiller YoY +0.7% · FHFA HPI +1.7%
⚠️ NAHB HMI: 34 — builder sentiment severely depressed
✅ Housing starts 1,502K · Building permits 1,372K · MBA Refi Index 978
📊 CA median home: $873,900 · National months supply: 4.1
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of 2026-05-01
📊 NFP: +178K · U-3: 4.3% · LFPR: 61.9%
💡 Avg hourly earnings YoY: +3.5% · JOLTS openings: 6.9M · Quit rate: 1.9%
👉 ADP private payrolls: 62K — significant gap below NFP
📊 Initial claims 4-wk avg: 207.5K · Continuing claims: 1,785K
✅ Construction payrolls: +26K — sector adding jobs
📌 CA unemployment: 5.4%
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of 2026-05-01
MaterialPrice
Lumber$573/MBF
Copper$5.98/lb
Steel HRC$1,075/ton
⚠️ Cost environment: Inflating
📊 Remodeling RMI: 62 · ABI: 49.8 (below 50 = contracting design pipeline)
👉 Backlog: 8.1 months · National permits: 1,372K
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of 2026-04-27
✅ Regime: Risk-On — 4 of 5 indicators supportive
IndicatorValueScore
Yield Curve (2s10s)+0.55%✅
Credit SpreadsTight (~284 bps)✅
ISM PMI52.7✅
Fed Path~1 cut priced—
DXYDown trend✅
📌 Sector rotation: XLE, XLF, XLV leading / XLK, XLY, XLC lagging
⚠️ Watch: Iran peace talks stalled — oil spike risk, potential DXY reversal

📊 S&P EPS beat rate: 84% · Blended EPS growth: +15.1%
🔥 AMD hit all-time high at $354; S&P 500 broke 7200 for first time

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Thursday, April 30, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 30
Regime: Neutral · S&P futures +0.15% · DXY 98.86 (↓ trend) · 10Y yield 4.42% · VIX 18.81
✅ Fear & Greed: 70 (Greed) · Put/Call: 0.83 · HY Spreads: Tight
💡 Oil surging to $114 WTI on Iran/Strait dynamics · Gold $4,638 near ATH
👉 Sector rotation: XLE leading (energy), XLK lagging (tech fatigue continues)
⚠️ Alert tickers: APP, PLTR, IBRX — all flagged for volatility
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 30
BTC: $77,161 EOD (Apr 29) · 24h: -1.1% · Dominance: 60.0% · Structure: Neutral
⚠️ Testing $78,180 intraday resistance; $75,731 support holding
💡 Weekly (Apr 27): BTC/IGV correlation 0.68 — decoupling thesis gaining traction as BTC gained while tech sold off
✅ On-chain phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at 7-year low, LTH supply at ATH, whale buying at decade pace
👉 Stablecoin market cap: $322B new ATH — structural demand floor independent of BTC price action
🔥 BTC dominance broke above 60% — capital rotating from alts to BTC, classic risk-off posture within crypto
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 30
🏘️ Hollister/San Benito (today): Median $765K SFH · 100 active listings · 38 DOM
💡 63 new listings, 30 pending, 41 closed in March — balanced market
Monthly (Apr 1): 30Y rate 6.38% · CA median $850.7K · Local median $748.6K · Months supply 1.52
Existing sales 4.09M · New homes 587K · NAHB HMI 38 (builder pessimism)
⚠️ Case-Shiller YoY +1.2% — price appreciation stalling · NAR median $398K
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1
🔥 NFP: -92K — first negative print, prior revised -17K additional · U-3: 4.4% (rising)
⚠️ LFPR dropped to 62.0% · Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4% (decelerating)
Construction payrolls: +30K · CA unemployment: 5.1%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M · Quit rate: 1.9% · ADP private: +62K
Initial claims 4wk avg: 210K · Continuing claims: 1,819K
👉 Labor market deteriorating — negative NFP is a recession signal worth monitoring
🏗️ CONSTRUCTION & REMODELING Weekly (Fridays) · as of Apr 24
Lumber$583.50/MBFCopper$6.02/lb
Steel HRC$1,055/tonABI49.8
⚠️ Cost environment: Inflating · Copper and steel trending up
RMI: 62 (expansion) · Permits: 1,518K · Backlog: 8.6 months
Construction spending: $2,190.4B · ABI 49.8 (contraction territory)
📊 MACRO REGIME & SCORECARD Weekly (Mondays) · as of Apr 27
Regime: Risk-On — 4 of 5 indicators supportive
Yield Curve 2s10s+0.55%✅ Supportive
Credit Spreads~284 bps✅ Supportive
ISM PMI52.7✅ Supportive
Fed Path~1 cut⚪ Neutral
DXY TrendDown✅ Supportive
👉 Sector rotation: XLE, XLF, XLV leading / XLK, XLY, XLC lagging — real economy over digital economy tilt
⚠️ Watch: Iran peace talks stalled — oil spike risk could reverse dollar weakness
💰 PORTFOLIO & EARNINGS Monthly (1st) · as of Apr 1
S&P EPS beat rate: 75% · Blended EPS growth: +13.0%
🔥 Portfolio alerts: IBRX crashed 26% on FDA Anktiva warning; XRPC down 41% on XRP collapse; APP and AVGO pulled back 15%+ from highs
⚠️ Key risks: TSMC capacity constraints threatening AI chip supply; IBRX regulatory/litigation risk unresolved; crypto altcoin exposure (XRPC) deteriorating
📊 Financial Intelligence Daily Snapshot

item.title: 📊 Financial Intelligence — Wednesday, April 29, 2026
item.description:
📈 MARKETS & RISK Daily · as of Apr 29, 2026
Regime: Neutral — S&P futures +0.22%. VIX at 17.83 (calm range). Fear & Greed at 67 (Greed). Put/Call 0.79.

💡 DXY at 98.66, trend Down — dollar weakness continues, supportive for commodities and risk assets.
10Y Yield at 4.35%, 2s10s spread +0.52% (normal curve).

WTI Oil $99.62 — elevated on Iran/supply dynamics. Gold $4,596 — near all-time highs.
HY Spreads: Widening. ⚠️ Watch for credit stress if this persists.

Sector rotation: XLE leading (energy/oil), XLB lagging (materials).
⚠️ Alert tickers: APP, IBRX, NEM
₿ CRYPTO & DIGITAL ASSETS Daily | Weekly deep-dive updates Mondays · as of Apr 29
BTC EOD: $76,459 | 24h: +1.0% | Dominance: 60.0%
Fear & Greed: 67 (Greed)

⚠️ Key level alert: Lost $77K support; rejected at $80K resistance zone repeatedly. Structure: Bearish.

💡 Dominance surged above 60% — breakout from 8-month consolidation range. Capital flowing into BTC at expense of altcoins (classic risk-off within crypto).

Weekly deep-dive (Apr 27): BTC/IGV correlation 0.68 (easing from 0.70). On-chain phase: Accumulation — exchange reserves at 7-year low, LTH supply at ATH, whale buying at decade pace. Stablecoin market cap hit $322B ATH. Stablecoins processed $33T in 2025, surpassing Visa+Mastercard combined.
🏠 HOUSING & REAL ESTATE Local: when new data | National: Monthly (1st) · local as of Apr 29
Hollister/San Benito (fresh today):
Median home price: $750,000 | Active listings: 157 | DOM: 38 days
💡 Median down 5% YoY; balanced market; condos sitting 158 days avg.

National (Apr 1 data):
Existing home sales: 4.09M | New home sales: 587K | Starts: 1,487K | Permits: 1,376K
NAR median price: $398,000 | Case-Shiller YoY: +1.2% | NAHB HMI: 38 (weak builder sentiment)
30Y mortgage rate: 6.38% | MBA Refi Index: 1,341
CA median: $850,680 | Local median: $748,584 | Local months supply: 1.52
💼 JOBS & LABOR Monthly (1st) | Claims: weekly when flagged · as of Apr 1
🔥 NFP: -92K — first negative payrolls print; prior month revised down -17K.
U-3: 4.4% (rising) | LFPR: 62.0% (falling — workers leaving labor force)
ADP private payrolls: +62K | Avg hourly earnings YoY: +1.4%
JOLTS openings: 6.9M | Quit rate: 1.9%

Initial claims (4-wk avg): 210K | Continuing claims: 1,819K
⚠️ Construction payrolls: +30K — still positive but decelerating.
CA unemployment: 5.1%
